digitally-sign-pdf-visible-first-page.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Visible Signature on First Page
digitally-sign-pdf-visible-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, set a certificate, and add a visible digital signature to page one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, then save the signed document.

add-second-digital-signature-page-3.title: Add a Second Digital Signature on Page 3
add-second-digital-signature-page-3.description: Demonstrates how to apply an additional visible digital signature to page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including certificate setup, appearance image, and custom rectangle positioning.

custom-signature-appearance-image-backgr.title: Configure Custom Signature Appearance with Image and Background Color
custom-signature-appearance-image-backgr.description: Demonstrates how to set a foreground image and a background color for a PDF digital signature using Aspose.Pdf's SignatureCustomAppearance before signing the document.

suppress-signature-reason-location.title: Suppress Signature Reason and Location When Signing PDF
suppress-signature-reason-location.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while suppressing the reason, location, and contact info by setting those signature properties to empty strings.

sign-pdf-french-caption.title: Sign PDF with French Digital Signature Caption
sign-pdf-french-caption.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and configure the SignatureCustomAppearance to display the caption in French.

remove-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Signature from PDF
remove-signature-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete a digital signature named 'ApprovalSignature' from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade and save the updated document.

verify-pdf-signature-exists.title: Verify Presence and Validity of a PDF Signature
verify-pdf-signature-exists.description: Shows how to determine whether a PDF contains a signature named 'ContractSigner' and then verify that signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

verify-pdf-signature-field.title: Verify PDF Signature Field
verify-pdf-signature-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and validate the cryptographic integrity of a signature field named "ManagerSignature" using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

extract-certificate-from-pdf-signature.title: Extract Certificate from PDF Signature Field
extract-certificate-from-pdf-signature.description: Shows how to retrieve the signing certificate from a digital signature field in a PDF document and save it as a .cer file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-signature-image-png.title: Extract Signature Image and Save as PNG
extract-signature-image-png.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract the image of the 'WitnessSignature' signature field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and convert the JPEG stream to a PNG file.

custom-signature-appearance-no-caption.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Caption
custom-signature-appearance-no-caption.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while hiding the default "Digitally signed by" label by using a custom signature appearance.

sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF file using a password‑protected PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-pdf-signature-missing-handling.title: Remove PDF Signature with Missing Signature Handling
remove-pdf-signature-missing-handling.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific signature from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades while gracefully handling the case where the signature does not exist.

verify-pdf-signatures-log-json.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Log Results to JSON
verify-pdf-signatures-log-json.description: The example opens a signed PDF, checks each embedded signature for validity, and writes the signature name and verification status to a formatted JSON file.

sign-and-verify-pdf.title: Sign and Verify PDF Using PdfFileSignature
sign-and-verify-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with a certificate using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and then immediately verify the signature's authenticity.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-reason-location.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Reason and Location
digitally-sign-pdf-with-reason-location.description: Demonstrates how to apply a visible digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, specifying the signature reason and location.

add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF on Specific Page
add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field to a specific page of a PDF and then applying a PKCS#1 digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature
extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and retrieve the X.509 certificate information such as issuer and expiration date using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

generate-pdf-signature-report.title: Generate PDF Signature Verification Report
generate-pdf-signature-report.description: Shows how to extract digital signature details from a PDF using PdfFileSignature and create a new PDF that lists each signature's signer, reason, location, date, validity, revision and coverage.

retry-sign-pdf-when-file-locked.title: Retry Signing PDF When File Is Locked
retry-sign-pdf-when-file-locked.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while handling file‑locking issues by implementing a retry loop with configurable attempts and delay.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.title: Remove All Signatures from PDF
remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to delete all digital signatures from a PDF document and save a clean copy.

verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.title: Verify Multiple Signatures in a PDF
verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.description: Shows how to bind a signed PDF, retrieve all signature names, and verify each signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-signature-images-html-report.title: Extract Signature Images to HTML Report
extract-signature-images-html-report.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's image using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, and embeds the images as Base64 data URIs in an HTML file for visual inspection.

sign-pdf-with-semi-transparent-backgroun.title: Sign PDF with Semi‑Transparent Background Appearance
sign-pdf-with-semi-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and configure a custom signature appearance with a light‑gray (semi‑transparent) background to improve document readability.

list-signature-names-in-pdf.title: List Signature Names in a PDF Document
list-signature-names-in-pdf.description: Shows how to retrieve the names of all active signatures in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

sign-pdf-with-visible-image.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-visible-image.description: A console application that adds a visible signature appearance from an image to a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. It loads the PDF, sets the signature image, defines its position, and saves the signed document.

sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a certificate and add a visible signature image positioned at the bottom‑right corner of the last page.

locale-specific-pdf-signature.title: Locale‑Specific PDF Signature Appearance
locale-specific-pdf-signature.description: Demonstrates how to apply a digital signature to a PDF with locale‑specific labels and appearance settings for German, Spanish, and Japanese languages using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signatures-re-sign-pdf.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF with a New Certificate
remove-signatures-re-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing digital signatures from a PDF and then apply a new signature using a different certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

verify-pdf-no-signatures-false.title: Verify PDF Without Signatures Returns False
verify-pdf-no-signatures-false.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, check if it contains any digital signatures, and attempt to verify a non‑existent signature, which should return false.

remove-all-pdf-signatures-recursively.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs Recursively
remove-all-pdf-signatures-recursively.description: Shows how to walk through a directory tree, open each PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, remove all digital signatures, and save the file back.

extract-signature-certificate-serial-num.title: Extract and Log Signature Certificate Serial Number
extract-signature-certificate-serial-num.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signatures, extract the X.509 certificate for each signature, and log the certificate's serial number for auditing.

list-signature-reasons-and-locations.title: List Signature Reasons and Locations in a PDF
list-signature-reasons-and-locations.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all signature names, and extract each signature's reason and location for auditing.

sign-pdf-with-hidden-appearance.title: Sign PDF with Hidden Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-with-hidden-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while completely hiding the signature appearance, preserving cryptographic validity.

extract-signing-certificate-subject-dn.title: Extract Signing Certificate Subject DN from PDF
extract-signing-certificate-subject-dn.description: Demonstrates how to bind a signed PDF, retrieve the first signature, extract its X.509 certificate, read the subject distinguished name, and store it in an in‑memory DataTable.
